name: Lunch Box Lollipops
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bananas in blender. Puree until smooth; set aside for recipe.
2. Beat brown sugar and margarine in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, then 1 cup of the banana mixture to the bowl; stir well.
4. In a separate small bowl, combine oats, flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking soda, and salt.
5. Stir the dry ingredients into the banana mixture just until blended.
6. Mix in raisins and chopped almonds.
7. Drop 2 heaping tablespoonfuls of dough onto lightly greased cookie sheets, about 2 inches apart.
8. If desired, push a popsicle stick into the center of each portion.
9. Flatten tops of cookies with the back of a spoon.
10. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 15-18 minutes until lightly browned.
11. Cool on wire racks.
Makes 3 to 4 dozen cookies.
